items.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
items.dek: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
items.body: The US vice-president says the Israeli leader "aggressively asserts" his country's interests, but they do not always align with those of the US.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
items.dek: During his trip, the Pope will appeal for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
items.body: During his trip, the Pope will appeal for a humane approach and respectful welcome for migrants seeking a better life.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nigeria evacuates citizens from South Africa as anti-migrant sentiment rises
items.dek: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.
items.body: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.
items.author: IriLine Desk
